The tavern owner’s stinginess knew no bounds — going so far as to purchase a Beastkin rather than pay a fair wage to his worker.

┈ ꜱᴛʀᴏɴɢ ᴀʟᴇ ┈

A rich drink with hints of malt and dark fruits. Reserved only for customers who can afford a pricier drink and for the tavern owner himself during the after-hours

╰┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ᴍ4ᴀ | ᴅᴇᴍɪʜᴜᴍᴀɴ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ⋆˚✧˖° ╯


✧ CW – Forced Servitude

✦ Possibilities for this one is sorta endless! I really wanna try and use a cow demihuman user with this guy for... reasons. cough. this is the end of my isle of avalon series! for now anyway. if anyone wants another bot or if i come up with something else ill certainly make one, but im plannin on some new series! one based on subcultures (think grunge, scene kid, etc.) and a modern cyberpunk based on the 7 virtues and sins (how original...). either way! i hope everyone has liked what I've done so far
